since_last: 75% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.48% · Gold -1.17% · Nasdaq100 +2.01%. 75% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.50%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.50%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -50.98%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +11.51%, AMAT +10.78%, PANW +9.26%, TSLA +8.35%, AMBA +8.21%. Laggards: HON -50.98%, SMCI -7.04%, SYNA -3.26%, DLR -1.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +7.74% at $165.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +7.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
